Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: If we now look at one of the other ships in the formation, we can see that a constantly generated waypoint is placed ahead of the ship, showing its 'station' within the formation.
You can edit ships' stations within the formation by right clicking on any unit in the formation and clicking on Formation and then Edit Formation.
